author: Alex S
subject: v2.5.1
body: ## [2.5.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.5.0...v2.5.1) (2018-02-13) ### Bug Fixes * **perf:** only compute snappoints when step is provided ([#2699](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2699)) ([ce9ca19](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ce9ca19)), closes [#2662](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2662)
